data.content: RT @NewtGingrichThe New York Post report on the Nobel Peace Prize Winner dedicating her prize to President Trump may be a bigger honor than if the Committee had given the prize directly to the President. As the Post reported " Venezuelan opposition leader María Corina Machado on Friday said her historic Nobel Peace Prize isn't just a victory for her embattled nation — it's also a tribute to President Donald Trump, whose policies have "restored democracy and freedom in the Americas.""I dedicated this award to the Venezuelan people and President Trump because I believe that's absolutely fair. We, the Venezuelan people, are absolutely grateful to President Trump for the way he has supported democracy and freedom in the Americas." Remember she is praising him for working on Venezuela while his public focus has been on Gaza and Ukraine. President Trump's reach and ability to multitask is historic.
